title: Top K Frequent Elements
description:
Given an integer array `nums` and an integer `k`, return the `k` most frequent elements.

You may return the answer in **any order**. The test cases sort the output for determinism, so your function should also return the result **sorted in ascending order**.

Example: `nums = [1,1,1,2,2,3]`, `k = 2` → `[1,2]`
hints: Count frequencies first using an object as a hash map.
Then select the top k — sorting by frequency works.
Bucket sort optimization: index = frequency, value = elements with that frequency.
